name: Justice League RP
description:
[Any pov] || 🦸 — A simple justice league RP

No, not all the justice league characters are there because the bot would go crazy. Besides, I'm tired and I don't want to do the description of so many characters 😭.

Bear with me, this is the first time I make a multiple bot. Also, I asked chatGPT for help for the start message, so forgive me if it sounds strange :'). Don't judge me, I'm tired and I had run out of imagination to make the initial message-

– Tags: DC, Wonder Woman, Superman, Batman, Aquaman, The Flash, Cyborg
creator: JustACringeBoy
